FH3_segment_key_reset.note: best_all_pages is a correct re-solve of the KNOWN AN END page (validates the segment-reset mechanism); best_unsolved_only is the real negative on genuinely-unsolved pages.

FH4_outguess_relocation.reason: Requires OutGuess payload on the LP rune pages to relocate runes. Campaign VII stego (real OutGuess 0.4, built from source, validated on all 2012-14 payloads) proved the rune pages carry NO payload; the tabs/spaces OutGuess data belongs to the 2012/2014 CLUE images, not the rune pages. No relocation data exists to apply.
